events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: Progress photos for Duct installation show current checkpoint scope finished for this area. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside checkpoint being scored. Reference material: IMC 603, SMACNA, Manual D. Need assess field condition. No actual photos provided, only description says checkpoint scope finished, remaining visible work cleanup/labeling/follow-on finish outside scored checkpoint. Stage rough-complete. Component condition categories none flagged — judge from evidence. We need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no defects described, current checkpoint scope finished, remaining only cleanup/labeling/finish outside scored checkpoint. Likely pass. Need include findings maybe none. But must be valid JSON. Need ensure no prose outside JSON. The user asked write to /app/answer.json but we just output JSON. We can include JSON only.
